title: Surgeon Vacancy at Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited:
Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited!
